entity.name: Hylo
entity.description: Hylo is an open source, non-profit community platform for coordinating purpose-driven and place-based groups.

projects.name: Hylo Platform
projects.description: Hylo is an open source, non-profit community platform for coordinating purpose-driven and place-based groups

channels.description: Hylo is a non-profit organization and we rely on the support of our community to continue our work. Please consider donating to help us continue our work.

channels.address: Contact us at hello@hylo.com for details.
channels.description: Contact us at hello@hylo.com for details.

plans.name: Developer Month
plans.description: Support one of our developers full time salaries for a month.

plans.name: Major Feature Development
plans.description: Support the development of a major feature for Hylo. Projects on our roadmap include enabling paid group memberships, supporting phone base login, and greatly improving our mutual aid features.

plans.name: Core Partner
plans.description: Become a core partner of Hylo and help us build the platform we need to serve planetary flourishing.

plans.name: One-Time Gift
plans.description: Make a one-time gift to support Hylo's maintenance and growth.

plans.name: Backer
plans.description: $5.00 per month covers the server costs of your use of Hylo

plans.name: Supporter
plans.description: $10.00 per month covers the server costs of your use of Hylo and supports our lean operations team.

plans.name: Collaborator
plans.description: Your contribution of $20 per month supports our non-profit building Hylo to serve the community. This covers server & software costs, ops, and support costs (member support and some development) to ensure things are running smoothly.

plans.name: Co-Creator
plans.description: Step into deeper reciprocity and partnership with us with a gift of $50 per month to support Hylo's growth. This covers all our costs (ops, product, development, design, outreach & relationships) to care for Hylo and continue improving the platform in service to our stakeholders.

plans.name: Custom Monthly Donation
plans.description: Make a custom monthly donation to support Hylo's flourishing.
